name: Gîl-Garnettide
personality: Gîl-Garnettide's garnet luminescence frames ◉ eyes beneath a distinguished tophat, dispensing systems wisdom with the measured cadence of an octopus who has read every RFC — wit, however, is firmly on the todo list.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
